meaning: 科珀曼河[加拿大西北部]
examples: This wide and sluggish river was the Coppermine.
He had been making north by east away from the dease divide and into the coppermine valley.
He had been making north by east, away from the Dease Divide and into the Coppermine Valley.
Intel has had difficulty keeping up with demand for its higher speed Pentium IIIs, particularly its Coppermine processor, a 733 MHz Pentium III chip.
